description:
Sri Lankan captain #LasithMalinga entered the singular immortality as the greatest fast bowler of all-time becoming the only bowler in international cricket history to claim two four-wicket hat-tricks in four balls with the incredible figures of 5 wickets for 6 runs in a facile 37-run routing of New Zealand in the third T20 at the Pallekelle International Cricket Stadium.

#WWWW #4in4
